title: In Iraq, the U.S. Tried to Bring Allies on Board. Not in Iran.
summary_full: This time, President Trump went to war without preparing the public, seeking U.N. approval or even consulting allies. But they will have to pick up the pieces.
summary_public: This time, President Trump went to war without preparing the public, seeking U.N. approval or even consulting allies. But they will have to pick up the pieces.
